topic: Top 3 Monetisable Data/Automation Niches - Low Barrier, High Willingness to Pay

existing_assets: ASX small-cap screener premium report product

niches.target_customer: Australian retail investor / finance hobbyist — DIY investor aged 30-55 managing their own ASX portfolio, spending 2-5 hrs/week on research, already paying $19-49/mo for tools like Sharesight or Stock Doctor
niches.what_they_pay_for: Curated, actionable weekly small-cap stock intelligence they cannot easily assemble themselves: top movers, earnings calendar, sector rotation signals, AI-synthesised investment thesis per stock — saves 3-5 hrs of manual research per week

price_point.rationale: Sharesight Standard tier is AUD $29/mo; Stock Doctor positions as premium research at est. $60-100/mo — our product sits mid-market. Half the adult Australian population are investors (ASX Investor Study 2023); proven willingness to pay in this bracket.

niches.product_idea: Weekly 'Small-Cap Alpha Brief' — extend existing ASX screener to auto-generate a top-10 opportunity digest each Monday: price/volume movers, earnings surprises, sector catalyst summary, AI thesis per pick. Gated via a Stripe payment link + email/PDF delivery. Zero new infrastructure needed — reuse screener engine + agent email pipeline.
niches.why_it_fits: Direct extension of existing ASX screener report product. Same data pipeline, same audience. First product validates demand; recurring subscription converts one-off buyers into MRR. Bluesky social presence can drive top-of-funnel traffic with free teasers.
niches.barrier_to_entry: Very low — screener engine already built; add Stripe checkout + scheduled email send
market_evidence: Sharesight: AUD $19-49/mo with large AU user base
Stock Doctor: premium ASX research subscription, 30yr track record
Morningstar Investor AU: paid subscription for research data
Finance CPM rates 3-5x higher than entertainment — proven monetisation signal
Half of Australian adults hold investments (ASX Investor Study 2023)

niches.niche_name: Automated Competitor & Price Intelligence Reports for SMBs
niches.target_customer: SMB owner in e-commerce, retail, or professional services — 5-50 employees, selling online or locally, manually checking competitor pricing/offers 1-2 hrs/week but unable to justify a $500+/mo enterprise tool
niches.what_they_pay_for: A weekly automated digest of competitor pricing changes, new product/service launches, and social activity — clear ROI framing: 'Know before your customers do.' Eliminates manual scrolling. Saves 2-4 hrs/week. Directly impacts margin protection decisions.

price_point.rationale: Browse AI / Visualping target same audience at $49-99/mo. Apollo (lead enrichment) $49-79/user/mo. SMB survey data: 84% increased AI budgets in 2025; prioritise solutions with demonstrable ROI. Micro-SaaS sweet spot: $19-99/mo for single-purpose time-saving tools.

niches.product_idea: 'Competitor Pulse' report service — customer enters 3-5 competitor URLs + their own product category. Our agent system auto-scrapes weekly: pricing pages, product listings, new announcements, social posts. Delivers a clean PDF/email digest comparing changes week-over-week. Built on existing agent infrastructure with a simple web form intake. Ship as a done-for-you service first (manual-backed by agents), then automate.
niches.why_it_fits: Leverages existing autonomous agent HQ system for web scraping + report generation. No new tech stack. Directly monetises the agent infrastructure already built. Can be offered as an add-on to ASX screener customers who are business owners.
niches.barrier_to_entry: Low — existing agents can scrape and synthesise; need a simple intake form + Stripe + PDF/email output
market_evidence: Browse AI: 770,000+ users tracking competitor prices
EZ Fulfill (e-commerce automation): $8k MRR with 1,200 merchants
SMB pain point: 68% abandon expensive platforms — gap for affordable niche tools
Price monitoring positioned as 'business-critical' with 'lost revenue' framing — high urgency buy

niches.niche_name: On-Demand Niche B2B Prospect Lead Packs
niches.target_customer: Indie developer, startup founder, or SMB sales team doing B2B outreach — needs a targeted list of 50-200 qualified prospects for a very specific ICP (ideal customer profile) without paying $600-1500/mo for Hunter, Kaspr, or Apollo at scale
niches.what_they_pay_for: A fresh, enriched CSV of qualified leads matching their exact specification — company size, industry, job title, geography, funding stage, tech stack signals — delivered within hours. One-off or monthly refresh. ROI is immediate: one closed deal from a $149 pack pays for itself 10-100x.

price_point.rationale: Apollo charges $49-119/user/mo for self-serve scraping. Kaspr $68-115/user/mo. A curated, pre-filtered pack at $79-149 one-off undercuts subscription fatigue while delivering immediate value. B2B buyers have clearest ROI justification of any category.

niches.product_idea: 'Prospect Pack' on-demand service — customer fills out a brief: ICP description, geography, company size, role title, industry. Our agent system (using LinkedIn scraping-adjacent tools, public business directories, and enrichment APIs) assembles, deduplicates, and scores a lead list, delivering a CSV within 4-8 hours. Sold as a Gumroad/Stripe product with a typeform intake. First packs manually QA'd by agent, then scaled.
niches.why_it_fits: Agent HQ system already capable of structured data gathering and synthesis (demonstrated by ASX screener). B2B outreach is the #1 pain point for indie devs and startup SMBs. Can promote via Bluesky dev community. One-off payment model avoids subscription fatigue — lowers conversion barrier.
niches.barrier_to_entry: Low-medium — agent system exists; needs lead enrichment data source integration (e.g. Apify LinkedIn scraper or Apollo free tier + enrichment). Start as manual-backed service.
market_evidence: Apollo Basic: $49/user/mo — $600M+ ARR company serving this exact need
Hunter Starter: $600/mo for 3,000 lead resolutions — massive price ceiling above us
Median CAC for B2B SaaS reached $2.00 per $1.00 ARR in 2025 — lead quality at premium
91% of AI-adopting SMBs report AI boosting revenue — validation of AI-assembled data products
Indie Hackers success: niche one-problem tools at $79/mo sustain $5k-50k MRR solo

summary: Three highly complementary niches identified. Niche 1 (ASX Alerts Subscription) is the fastest to ship and most directly extends existing infrastructure — estimated 4 hours to first paying customer using the screener engine already built. Niche 2 (Competitor Intelligence) monetises the agent HQ system with a clear B2B ROI story at USD $49/mo. Niche 3 (Lead Packs) has the highest per-transaction revenue potential and serves the indie dev/SMB sales audience with immediate ROI. Recommended sequencing: ship Niche 1 this week (lowest effort, proven audience), validate Niche 2 with 3 pilot customers, run Niche 3 as a one-off productised service before automating.
recommended_sequencing: Week 1: Launch ASX Alpha Brief subscription at AUD $29/mo — direct Stripe link, email delivery, reuse screener pipeline
Week 2: Offer Competitor Pulse as a beta service to 5 SMB customers at USD $49/mo — manual-backed by agents
Week 3: Ship first 3 Prospect Packs at USD $79-149 one-off via Gumroad — validate demand before automating
